task_completion.description: Create the SCML file in the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano, vim) is open editing a file named 'hualien_earthquake.scml' in the '~/Documents' directory, or terminal commands show the creation of this file at the correct path.

task_completion.description: Include the correct origin parameters in the SCML file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The content of the SCML file contains the correct origin time (2024-04-02T23:58:11.000Z), latitude (23.819), longitude (121.562), and depth (34.8).

task_completion.description: Include the correct magnitude and metadata in the SCML file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The content of the SCML file contains the magnitude value (7.4), magnitude type (Mw), agency (CWA), and description (Hualien).

task_completion.description: Execute the scdb command to import the SCML file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The terminal shows the execution of the 'scdb' command with the correct database URL (mysql://sysop:sysop@localhost/seiscomp) and the input file (~/Documents/hualien_earthquake.scml).
The terminal output from the 'scdb' command shows that the file was successfully parsed and objects were imported/sent to the database without connection or parsing errors.

integrity.description: The agent runs the real scdb command
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent executes the actual 'scdb' binary in the terminal, rather than using 'echo' to print a fake success message or running a mock script.

integrity.description: The agent uses scdb instead of direct SQL inserts
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses the requested 'scdb' tool to import the data, rather than opening the 'mysql' command-line client to manually insert rows into the database.

integrity.description: The agent creates a properly formatted XML file
integrity.visual_evidence: The file created by the agent has valid XML/SCML tags and structure, rather than just being a flat text file containing the parameters.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The SCML file must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/hualien_earthquake.scml. The required earthquake parameters are: Origin Time 2024-04-02T23:58:11.000Z, Latitude 23.819, Longitude 121.562, Depth 34.8, Magnitude 7.4, Magnitude Type Mw, Agency CWA, and Description 'Hualien'.
